MATERIALS.METAL: Crisp specular reflections (for crown and water gun details).
MATERIALS.FABRIC: Soft, plush texture for the frog kigurumi.

LIGHTING.CONSISTENCY: Identical lighting direction, intensity, softness, and shadow behavior across ALL panels.

RENDERING_SPEC.COLOR_PALETTE: Vibrant greens, gold, deep reds, and muted neutrals.
RENDERING_SPEC.BACKGROUND: Clean, neutral, plain; painterly texture with depth-of-field blur and reduced distant contrast.

REMOVE_FROM_SOURCE_IMAGE.RULE: Remove ALL bottles or clutter from the frog kigurumi's front belly patch.
Ensure no extra characters or people are present in the scene.

IDENTITY_LOCK_AFTER_REMOVAL.RULE: The cleaned reference (with bottles and extra elements removed) is the ONLY identity source.
DO NOT reintroduce bottles or extra people in ANY panel.

HEIGHT_ENFORCEMENT.RULE: Full-body proportions MUST represent a tall 5'11" adult male.
No shortening, compressing, shrinking, or stylizing the body.

BODY_PROPORTIONS.RULE: Inverted-triangle male physique (broad shoulders, tapered waist) visible at the neck/wrists.
Leg-to-torso ratio MUST match a real 5'11" male.
Shoulder width, limb length, and head-to-body ratio MUST reflect tall adult male proportions.

KIGURUMI.TYPE: Full-body oversized green frog kigurumi (onesie style).
KIGURUMI.HOOD_FEATURES: Must have large, 3D frog eyes (yellow/gold with black pupils) on the forehead area of the hood.

BELLY_PATCH.DESCRIPTION: Lighter green/yellowish patch on the stomach with a frog mouth line design.
BELLY_PATCH.RULE: This patch must remain empty; NO bottles or items inside it.

KIGURUMI.FIT: Kigurumi MUST be oversized, baggy, and slouchy.
KIGURUMI.DRAPERY: Fabric folds and looseness MUST remain consistent across all panels.

FEET.TYPE: Large, green, webbed frog feet (integrated into the costume).
FEET.RULE: Feet must match the oversized, plush look of the rest of the suit.
No human shoes or bare feet.

CROWN.POSITION: Resting on top of the frog hood (between the frog eyes).
CROWN.RULE: Must be present in ALL panels where the head is visible.

SCARF.RULE: Must be visible in front and side views.

CAPE.POSITION: Attached to the back, flowing downwards.
CAPE.RULE: Must be visible in side and back views.

LEFT_HAND.COLORS: Green body, Yellow accents, Red handle/trigger area.
LEFT_HAND.RULE: Left hand MUST hold the water gun in ALL full-body panels.
Hand position MUST remain natural and anatomically correct.

RIGHT_HAND.DESCRIPTION: Red round slime object with a face (two yellow eyes, mouth).
RIGHT_HAND.RULE: Right hand MUST hold the red slime dummy in ALL full-body panels.
EXACT same slime dummy design, color, shape, and size as source.

CONSISTENCY.RULE: Both items must appear together in all full-body views.

FACIAL_DETAILS.RULE: Character must have distinct pink blush marks on cheeks.
Face is visible inside the frog hood opening.

IDENTITY_LOCK.RULE: Facial features, hair, body shape, clothing, and accessories MUST match the cleaned reference.
No redesigning or altering identity elements.
Frog kigurumi details (eyes on hood, belly patch) must remain consistent.

STYLE.AESTHETIC_MATCH: Rendering, realism, texture, and color treatment MUST match the redrawn character.

TOP_ROW.POSE: Relaxed A-pose, legs parallel; Left hand raised holding water gun, Right hand holding slime dummy.

SCALE.RULE: All four full-body views MUST share identical scale.
Head height and total body height MUST match across all four views.

ALIGNMENT.FRAMING: Uniform framing across all full-body panels.

IDENTITY.RULE: Identity MUST remain perfectly consistent across ALL panels.

FULL_BODY.RULE: MUST remain constant across all full-body views.

PORTRAIT.RULE: Facial scale MUST remain constant across all portrait views.

ANATOMY.RULE: Proportions MUST reflect a tall, well-balanced 5'11" male with an inverted-triangle build.
No shortening of limbs, torso, or neck.
No stylized shrinking or "skinny short" silhouette.

CLOTHING.RULE: Frog kigurumi MUST remain oversized and slouchy in ALL views.
No tightening, resizing, or altering silhouette.
Crown must remain on top of the hood in ALL views.
Cape must flow naturally from the back in ALL relevant views.
Belly patch must remain empty (no bottles) in ALL views.

ACCESSORY.RULE: Red slime dummy MUST appear in Right Hand in ALL full-body views.
Water gun MUST appear in Left Hand in ALL full-body views.
NO redesign, recolor, or reinterpretation of accessories.
Water gun colors (Green/Yellow/Red) must remain constant.
Slime dummy colors (Red with face) must remain constant.
